recap: Brazil came from behind to beat Japan 2-1 in stoppage time in Houston, with Gabriel Martinelli's late finish securing their knockout stage place after Kaishu Sano had given Japan a shock 29th-minute lead. Casemiro equalized with a 56th-minute header to turn the tide, but it took Martinelli's injury-time goal to snatch victory from an obstinate Japan side who had frustrated Brazil throughout a tense final period. Ancelotti's substitution and tactical adjustments proved decisive as Brazil overwhelmed their opponents in the second half despite a lethargic opening 45 minutes.
